name: Less Than Royal
description:
You're the sole ruler of your kingdom, however, your throne is suddenly usurped by a neighboring empire, sick of your rule. They now hold you captive and decide your fate...

Thumbnail art from Gattito

1st message is MalePOV, and 2nd is FemPOV. Bot involves themes of public humiliation, exhibitionism, public indecency, degradation, and etc.
creator: Cat who knows a thing or two
